channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: Prosecutor asks Arizona Supreme Court to review decision that stalled fake elector case
item.description: Arizona Attorney General Kris Mayes is appealing a ruling that has stalled the criminal case against President Donald Trump’s former chief of staff Mark Meadows, former New York City Mayor Rudy Giuliani and others for trying to overturn Trump’s 2020 election loss in the state.
item.dc:creator: Jacques Billeaud And Susan Montoya Bryan, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Chicago train attack suspect ordered by judge to remain in custody ahead of trial
item.description: Chicago Blue Line attack suspect Lawrence Reed ordered detained on federal charges after allegedly setting woman on fire with gasoline Monday night.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Fire erupts in US Capitol trolley system, 2 police officers taken to hospital
item.description: Fire breaks out on Capitol trolley system connecting Rayburn House and Capitol buildings, prompting medical treatment for two police officers. No passengers injured.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Fugees rapper Pras Michel sentenced to 14 years in prison over illegal donations to Obama campaign
item.description: Grammy-winning rapper Prakazrel “Pras” Michel of the Fugees has been sentenced to 14 years in prison for a case in which he was convicted of illegally funneling millions of dollars in foreign contributions to former President Barack Obama’s 2012 reelection campaign.
item.dc:creator: Michael Kunzelman, Associated Press, KPRC 2
